research_domain: scientific AI hypothesis generation and longitudinal biomedical discovery infrastructure
forecast_claim: Discovery-memory promotion should require a temporally bounded forecast: what contribution, collaborator, prior-work dependency, or benchmark improvement should become observable after the evidence cutoff.
prior_work_dependencies: FrontierScience-style rubric evaluation of open-ended research subtasks
agentic scientific reasoning systems with tool-integrated evidence routes
collaborator_or_dataset_targets: authors or labs releasing scientific forecasting benchmarks
expected_contribution_shape: A gate that turns vague discovery claims into forecastable packets with prior-work links, expected contribution form, evaluation signal, and falsification route.
evaluation_signal: Reviewer can decide after the forecast horizon whether the predicted contribution direction, benchmark movement, collaborator target, or dataset dependency materialized.
missingness: No production corpus, curator labels, or live bibliometric backtest has been attached yet.
revision_reason: Prior MC gates checked evidence structure but did not force a fixed evidence cutoff plus prospective evaluation horizon.
falsification_route: Revise or remove this gate if fixed-cutoff forecast packets fail to improve reviewer agreement or do not reduce vague unsupported discovery-memory promotions.
next_executable_action: Run the validator against valid and invalid fixtures, then add a CI job once the repository test layout is consolidated.
